reviews.review_msg: The class itself is actually good but getting feedback felt like you were bothering them, can be passive aggressive. Recorded lectures. Sometimes the marking rubric did not reflect on your actual grade. The final was fair, but be prepared to memorize almost everything because it's cumulative, and there isn't a lot of guidance on what to focus on.

This course contains several projects which are graded harshly and not aligned with the rubric. I also emailed a couple of times throughout the semester for help or clarification and was met with rude responses each time. The course is not difficult but the prof was a pain, I would avoid her if you can.
have never had a worst prof before. she made me feel diminished.
why give a rubric when you're NOT EVEN GONNA USE IT

Imagine you spend 3 weeks working on a written assignment and you thought you ate, but shortly after you realize that the assignment ate u instead.... all because she doesn't understand the point of rubrics.
I never wore my seatbelt so this misery could end
